creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Jim,
We're making a push to eliminate interactive ports.  Ecartis, despite being an older port, looks well maintained.  It lists the reason for interactive mode as "Stops to ask to create ecartis user/group".

That seems like a standard task that doesn't require interactivity.  Is it technically challenging to convert this?  What would it take?

It's beneficial to do this as well so that binary packages of ecartis can be built.

Thanks,
John
